name: One Ingredient Soft Caramel
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the label from the can of sweetened condensed milk.
2. Place the UNOPENED can in a VERY DEEP pot, such as a deep Dutch oven.
3. Cover the can with water so that it is 3 to 4 inches above the can.
4. Bring the water to a boil and maintain a steady boil for four (4) hours.
5. Ensure the can remains completely covered with water at all times; never allow the water level to drop below the top of the can, as this could cause an explosion.
6. After four hours, carefully remove the can using tongs and place it on a wire rack to cool.
7. Once cooled, refrigerate the can.
8. When ready to use, open the can; you will have soft caramel with the color of caramel.
Source: ORIGIN UNKNOWN - From Judy Dunn's Database
